T4_Hodgkin.description: Numbers of T4 cells/mm³ in blood samples from 20 patients in remission from Hodgkin's disease. These values are log-transformed in the answer to compute the confidence interval for the difference between groups.

T4_NonHodgkin.description: Numbers of T4 cells/mm³ in blood samples from 20 patients in remission from non-Hodgkin's (disseminated malignancies) disease. These values are log-transformed in the answer to compute the confidence interval for the difference between groups.
